original_question:
The product (8)(888...8) where the second factor has k digits is an integer whose digits have a sum of 1000. Find k.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

similar_questions.question: The product (6)(666...6) where the second factor has k digits is an integer whose digits have a sum of 900. Find k.
The product (9)(999...9) where the second factor has k digits is an integer whose digits have a sum of 1200. Find k.
The product (7)(777...7) where the second factor has k digits is an integer whose digits have a sum of 800. Find k.
The product (5)(555...5) where the second factor has k digits is an integer whose digits have a sum of 600. Find k.
The product (4)(444...4) where the second factor has k digits is an integer whose digits have a sum of 500. Find k.
